title: Round decimals
description: Round decimals and whole numbers to the nearest thousand, hundred, ten, one, tenth, or hundredth.

hints:
To help us round, let's place $56{,}291.8$ on a number line between the nearest thousands.  

$5\blueE6{,}291.8$ has $\blueE6$ thousands so it would come in between $56{,}000$ and $57{,}000$.

[[☃ image 1]]

The number $56{,}291.8$ has less than $5$ hundreds, so it is to the left of the midpoint.

[[☃ image 1]]

Since $56{,}291.8$ is closer to $56{,}000$, it would round to $56{,}000$.

[[☃ image 1]]
$56{,}291.8$ rounded to the nearest thousand is $56{,}000$.

To help us round, let's place $4{,}708.06$ on a number line between the nearest thousands.  

$\blueE4{,}708.06$ has $\blueE4$ thousands so it would come in between $4{,}000$ and $5{,}000$.

[[☃ image 1]]

The number $4{,}708.06$ has more than $5$ hundreds, so it is to the right of the midpoint.

[[☃ image 1]]

Since $4{,}708.06$ is closer to $5{,}000$, it would round to $5{,}000$.

[[☃ image 1]]

$4{,}708.06$ rounded to the nearest thousand is $5{,}000$.

[[☃ image 1]]
$83{,}960.11$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $84{,}000$.

[[☃ image 1]]

$1{,}658.013$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $1{,}700$.
